scripts.deploy:client: npm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting:client
scripts.deploy:server: npm run build:server && firebase deploy --only apphosting
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:client && npm run deploy:server
scripts.firebase:setup:hosting: firebase hosting:sites:get kflow-academy-app --project kflow-b3a39 2>/dev/null || firebase hosting:sites:create kflow-academy-app --project kflow-b3a39
scripts.firebase:setup: npm run firebase:use && npm run firebase:setup:hosting && npm run firebase:setup:apphosting
